title: Update all goto cleanup_protect_request calls and add NVM-specific error handling
description: Modify the 6+ goto cleanup_protect_request statements in oscore_protect_request (lines ~1462,1471,1484,1492,1501,1518) to route NVM errors to the new dedicated path. Ensure ret is set to OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED where appropriate and that wipe always occurs first. Add detailed comments explaining the security rationale for SSN handling on persistence failure.
